headline: Application logs scrub secret-shaped fields by default
summary: Structured application log lines now pass their fields through a redactor before they are written, so password-, token-, and key-shaped values are stripped automatically. This release also refreshes the vendored framework to blamejs 0.13.43.

items.title: Redact secret-shaped fields from application logs by default
items.body: Structured log lines now scrub password / token / key-shaped values automatically before they are written. Unicode bidi and format controls in log messages are escaped so a hostile value cannot reorder a log line in a terminal or syslog viewer.

items.title: Refresh the vendored framework to blamejs 0.13.43
items.body: Picks up the current framework crypto, logging, and middleware primitives.
